# LOGOS — real model marks (inline SVG, recolorable)

Paste these inline where a model is named (seg3 contenders, seg4 leaderboard rows, seg7 eval grid).
They render crisp at any size and inherit color via `fill`. Default white for the dark canvas;
size with the wrapper's height. Do NOT use the model's brand color (keep orange = VideoDB only).

```css
/* add to the segment <style> */
[data-composition-id="segN"] .logo{ display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; vertical-align:middle; }
[data-composition-id="segN"] .logo svg{ height:1em; width:auto; fill:#F4F2EE; }
[data-composition-id="segN"] .logo.lg svg{ height:46px; }
```

## Claude mark (for Claude Opus 4.7)
```html
<span class="logo"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="m4.7144 15.9555 4.7174-2.6471.079-.2307-.079-.1275h-.2307l-.7893-.0486-2.6956-.0729-2.3375-.0971-2.2646-.1214-.5707-.1215-.5343-.7042.0546-.3522.4797-.3218.686.0608 1.5179.1032 2.2767.1578 1.6514.0972 2.4468.255h.3886l.0546-.1579-.1336-.0971-.1032-.0972L6.973 9.8356l-2.55-1.6879-1.3356-.9714-.7225-.4918-.3643-.4614-.1578-1.0078.6557-.7225.8803.0607.2246.0607.8925.686 1.9064 1.4754 2.4893 1.8336.3643.3035.1457-.1032.0182-.0728-.164-.2733-1.3539-2.4467-1.445-2.4893-.6435-1.032-.17-.6194c-.0607-.255-.1032-.4674-.1032-.7285L6.287.1335 6.6997 0l.9957.1336.419.3642.6192 1.4147 1.0018 2.2282 1.5543 3.0296.4553.8985.2429.8318.091.255h.1579v-.1457l.1275-1.706.2368-2.0947.2307-2.6957.0789-.7589.3764-.9107.7468-.4918.5828.2793.4797.686-.0668.4433-.2853 1.8517-.5586 2.9021-.3643 1.9429h.2125l.2429-.2429.9835-1.3053 1.6514-2.0643.7286-.8196.85-.9046.5464-.4311h1.0321l.759 1.1293-.34 1.1657-1.0625 1.3478-.8804 1.1414-1.2628 1.7-.7893 1.36.0729.1093.1882-.0183 2.8535-.607 1.5421-.2794 1.8396-.3157.8318.3886.091.3946-.3278.8075-1.967.4857-2.3072.4614-3.4364.8136-.0425.0304.0486.0607 1.5482.1457.6618.0364h1.621l3.0175.2247.7892.522.4736.6376-.079.4857-1.2142.6193-1.6393-.3886-3.825-.9107-1.3113-.3279h-.1822v.1093l1.0929 1.0686 2.0035 1.8092 2.5075 2.3314.1275.5768-.3218.4554-.34-.0486-2.2039-1.6575-.85-.7468-1.9246-1.621h-.1275v.17l.4432.6496 2.3436 3.5214.1214 1.0807-.17.3521-.6071.2125-.6679-.1214-1.3721-1.9246L14.38 17.959l-1.1414-1.9428-.1397.079-.674 7.2552-.3156.3703-.7286.2793-.6071-.4614-.3218-.7468.3218-1.4753.3886-1.9246.3157-1.53.2853-1.9004.17-.6314-.0121-.0425-.1397.0182-1.4328 1.9672-2.1796 2.9446-1.7243 1.8456-.4128.164-.7164-.3704.0667-.6618.4008-.5889 2.386-3.0357 1.4389-1.882.929-1.0868-.0062-.1579h-.0546l-6.3385 4.1164-1.1293.1457-.4857-.4554.0608-.7467.2307-.2429 1.9064-1.3114Z"/></svg></span>
```

Usage: put the `.logo` span immediately before the model name, e.g.
`<span class="logo lg">…openai svg…</span> GPT-5.4`. Set svg height to match the text size.
